Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There are school printouts and newspaper[n]clippings, as well as handwritten signs.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}"Don't leave personal items in the lounge"[n]"Don't make loud noises late at night"[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like the dorm rules...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There are school printouts and newspaper[n]clippings, as well as handwritten signs.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}"Don't take from the fridge[n]without permission. If you do,[n]be sure to make up for it."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like there are new[n]additions to the dorm rules...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should reach out to[n]those who can go tonight...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Seems like everyone can go tonight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like the following people already[n]have plans and can't go tonight:[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Various schedules and contact[n]information are written here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Everyone is likely in the command[n]room. I should speak to Mitsuru[n]and head to Tartarus...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like not everyone can go tonight.[n]Should I still go to Tartarus...?[n]{f 1 1}
